item.dc:creator: Tim Rohan
item.description: At one point toward the end of the first half of the match between Spain and Cape Verde on Monday afternoon, it became apparent that Vozinha, the Cape Verde goalkeeper, was up for the challenge of facing one of the most talented, successful teams in the world

media:content.media:text: Vozinha raises the Cape Verde flag while standing on the soccer field
media:content.media:description: Vozinha of Cape Verde celebrates with the flag of Cabo Verde during the FIFA World Cup 2026 Group H match against Spain on June 15, 2026.

media:content.media:text: Vozinha of Cape Verde makes a save against Spain on June 15, 2026 in Atlanta.
media:content.media:description: Vozinha makes a save against Spain on Monday.

item.title: Meet the 40-year-old goalkeeper who blanked Spain in Cape Verde’s historic draw

item.dc:creator: David Hickey
item.description: What a crazy sports weekend that was — the NBA Finals concluded Saturday night, the World Cup kicked into high gear and the UFC staged fights last night on the White House lawn.

media:content.media:text: IR Iran Training And Press Conference - FIFA World Cup 2026
media:content.media:description: The Iranian soccer team train ahead of their World Cup match against New Zealand in Tijuana, Mexico on Sunday.

media:content.media:text: Brazil v Egypt - International Friendly
media:content.media:description: The Iranian soccer team train ahead of their World Cup match against New Zealand in Tijuana, Mexico on Sunday.

item.title: From The Sports Desk: One day after peace agreement, Iran takes field for World Cup

item.description: El Grupo H hace su debut en la Copa Mundial de la FIFA 2026 y sus aficionados —de España, Cabo Verde, Uruguay y Arabia Saudí— apoyan con cánticos desde la entrada de los estadios hasta las gradas.

media:content.media:title: Fanáticos dan la bienvenida al Grupo H de la Copa Mundial de la FIFA 2026
media:content.media:description: El Grupo H hace su debut en la Copa Mundial de la FIFA 2026 y sus aficionados —de España, Cabo Verde, Uruguay y Arabia Saudí— apoyan con cánticos desde la entrada de los estadios hasta las gradas.

item.title: Fanáticos dan la bienvenida al Grupo H de la Copa Mundial de la FIFA 2026

item.description: Agustín destaca la rebeldía de Uruguay tras el empate y cree que el gol pudo llegar antes. Orgulloso del grupo, encara los próximos partidos como finales y revela el mensaje de Bielsa en el entretiempo: tener confianza en su juego.

media:content.media:title: Agustín Canobbio: “Hay que ver los dos partidos (Cabo Verde y España) como finales”
media:content.media:description: Agustín destaca la rebeldía de Uruguay tras el empate y cree que el gol pudo llegar antes. Orgulloso del grupo, encara los próximos partidos como finales y revela el mensaje de Bielsa en el entretiempo: tener confianza en su juego.

item.title: Agustín Canobbio: “Hay que ver los dos partidos (Cabo Verde y España) como finales”

item.description: El ex seleccionado charrúa analizó línea por línea al equipo de Bielsa, luego de que no pudiera ganarle a Arabia Saudita en el debut mundialista y se pronunció sobre la responsabilidad de Fernando Muslera en el gol del cuadro asiático.

media:content.media:title: Diego Lugano: "Uruguay mereció más, pero esto no es de merecimiento" | Pasión Mundial
media:content.media:description: El ex seleccionado charrúa analizó línea por línea al equipo de Bielsa, luego de que no pudiera ganarle a Arabia Saudita en el debut mundialista y se pronunció sobre la responsabilidad de Fernando Muslera en el gol del cuadro asiático.

item.title: Diego Lugano: "Uruguay mereció más, pero esto no es de merecimiento" | Pasión Mundial

item.description: Maxi Araújo aseguró que anotó un gol que recordará para siempre tras marcar en el debut de Uruguay ante Arabia Saudita. El atacante destacó la mejoría de la Celeste en la segunda mitad y agradeció el apoyo de la afición en Miami.

media:content.media:title: Maxi Araújo: “Marcar en un Mundial es un sueño cumplido”
media:content.media:description: Maxi Araújo aseguró que anotó un gol que recordará para siempre tras marcar en el debut de Uruguay ante Arabia Saudita. El atacante destacó la mejoría de la Celeste en la segunda mitad y agradeció el apoyo de la afición en Miami.

item.title: Maxi Araújo: “Marcar en un Mundial es un sueño cumplido”

item.description: La selección uruguaya intentó ganar el partido hasta el último momento, pero tuvo que conformarse con el 1-1 ante los saudíes. El primer gol fue de Abdulelah Al-Amri y el empate corrió a cargo de Maxi Araújo, en un frenético arranque del Grupo H

media:content.media:title: Uruguay divide puntos con Arabia Saudita en su primer partido del Mundial 2026
media:content.media:description: La selección uruguaya intentó ganar el partido hasta el último momento, pero tuvo que conformarse con el 1-1 ante los saudíes. El primer gol fue de Abdulelah Al-Amri y el empate corrió a cargo de Maxi Araújo, en un frenético arranque del Grupo H

item.title: Uruguay divide puntos con Arabia Saudita en su primer partido del Mundial 2026

item.description: Marcelo Bielsa lamentó la derrota de Uruguay y aseguró que la Celeste debía imponerse en su debut mundialista. El técnico reconoció que el equipo concedió demasiados espacios en el primer tiempo y destacó la mejoría mostrada tras el descanso.

media:content.media:title: Marcelo Bielsa: “Teníamos que ganar este partido”
media:content.media:description: Marcelo Bielsa lamentó la derrota de Uruguay y aseguró que la Celeste debía imponerse en su debut mundialista. El técnico reconoció que el equipo concedió demasiados espacios en el primer tiempo y destacó la mejoría mostrada tras el descanso.

item.title: Marcelo Bielsa: “Teníamos que ganar este partido”

item.description: El excapitán de la "Celeste" aseguró que volver a ver a Uruguay en una Copa del Mundo le genera una gran ilusión. Además, confía en que el equipo de Marcelo Bielsa pueda crecer durante el torneo.

media:content.media:title: Diego Lugano se ilusiona con Uruguay: "El fútbol cada vez es más competitivo" | Pasión Mundial
media:content.media:description: El excapitán de la "Celeste" aseguró que volver a ver a Uruguay en una Copa del Mundo le genera una gran ilusión. Además, confía en que el equipo de Marcelo Bielsa pueda crecer durante el torneo.

item.title: Diego Lugano se ilusiona con Uruguay: "El fútbol cada vez es más competitivo" | Pasión Mundial

item.description: Federico Valverde reconoció la frustración por la derrota ante Arabia Saudita, aunque destacó la mejoría de Uruguay en la segunda mitad. El capitán aseguró que los nervios del debut influyeron y prometió trabajar el triple para ganar el próximo partido.

media:content.media:title: Valverde: “Nos jugaron en contra los nervios del debut”
media:content.media:description: Federico Valverde reconoció la frustración por la derrota ante Arabia Saudita, aunque destacó la mejoría de Uruguay en la segunda mitad. El capitán aseguró que los nervios del debut influyeron y prometió trabajar el triple para ganar el próximo partido.

item.title: Valverde: “Nos jugaron en contra los nervios del debut”

item.description: El seleccionador español transmitió calma luego de que “La Roja” no pudiera ganarle a Cabo Verde en su presentación en el Mundial; señaló la falta de "finura y frescura" como causa y aseguró que su selección sigue invicta en 32 partidos.

media:content.media:title: Luis de la Fuente tras inesperado debut de España: "Todavía nos quedan siete partidos" | Conferencia
media:content.media:description: El seleccionador español transmitió calma luego de que “La Roja” no pudiera ganarle a Cabo Verde en su presentación en el Mundial; señaló la falta de "finura y frescura" como causa y aseguró que su selección sigue invicta en 32 partidos.

item.title: Luis de la Fuente tras inesperado debut de España: "Todavía nos quedan siete partidos" | Conferencia

item.description: Los jugadores uruguayos brincan de júbilo y Bielsa respira cuando Maxi Araújo pesca un cabezazo bloqueado de Viñas y remata por el palo izquierdo.

media:content.media:title: El banquillo uruguayo da un respiro tras el gol del empate de Maximiliano Araújo
media:content.media:description: Los jugadores uruguayos brincan de júbilo y Bielsa respira cuando Maxi Araújo pesca un cabezazo bloqueado de Viñas y remata por el palo izquierdo.

item.title: El banquillo uruguayo da un respiro tras el gol del empate de Maximiliano Araújo

item.description: Vice President JD Vance spoke with NBC News' Tom Llamas about the announcement of a deal being reached between the U.S. and Iran to end the war in the Middle East. Vance said that nuclear inspectors will be allowed back into Iran under the agreement, as a signing ceremony is set to be held in Switzerland.

media:content.media:title: Vance says nuclear inspectors will return to Iran under terms to end war
media:content.media:description: Vice President JD Vance spoke with NBC News' Tom Llamas about the announcement of a deal being reached between the U.S. and Iran to end the war in the Middle East. Vance said that nuclear inspectors will be allowed back into Iran under the agreement, as a signing ceremony is set to be held in Switzerland.

item.title: Vance says nuclear inspectors will return to Iran under terms to end war

item.dc:creator: Matt Bradley
item.description: Israel’s more focused fight against the Iran-backed Hezbollah militia in Lebanon still has the power to disrupt U.S. efforts to resolve its war with Iran.

media:content.media:text: A man holds an Iranian flag on a street, in Tehran, Iran
media:content.media:description: A man raises an Iranian flag in Tehran after officials said they had reached a deal to end their war and reopen the Strait of Hormuz on June 15, 2026.

media:content.media:text: Israel Strikes In Beirut Southern Suburb, Kills Three
media:content.media:description: The scene of an Israeli strike on a southern suburb of Beirut on Sunday.

media:content.media:text: Israel And Iran Trade Attacks, Imperilling Ceasefires
media:content.media:description: Israeli settlers use a tractor to haul away a large section of a downed Iranian missile on the outskirts of Jericho, Israel, earlier this month.

item.title: Renewed fighting between Israel and Hezbollah could scupper the U.S-Iran deal

item.dc:creator: Peter Nicholas
item.description: Trump will touch down in France for the G7 meeting with allies who are at odds with him over a pair of wars.

media:content.media:text: Trump Signs Order Directing Customs Crackdown Amid Trade Gaps
media:content.media:description: President Donald Trump during an executive order signing in the Oval Office of the White House in Washington, DC, US, on Wednesday, June 3, 2026. Trump signed an executive order designed to tighten customs enforcement, his latest move to ramp up protectionist trade policies.

item.title: Trump to face European allies at odds with him over two wars at G7 summit

item.description: An agreement has been reached between the United States and Iran to end the war and reopen the Strait of Hormuz, according to President Donald Trump and Iranian officials. A document signing is expected to take place Friday. NBC’s Keir Simmons reports on the details of the deal for TODAY.

media:content.media:title: US and Iran Reach Framework Deal to End War, Reopen Hormuz
media:content.media:description: An agreement has been reached between the United States and Iran to end the war and reopen the Strait of Hormuz, according to President Donald Trump and Iranian officials. A document signing is expected to take place Friday. NBC’s Keir Simmons reports on the details of the deal for TODAY.

item.title: US and Iran Reach Framework Deal to End War, Reopen Hormuz

item.dc:creator: Dareh Gregorian
Ryan J. Reilly
item.description: California Gov. Gavin Newsom said Monday that he and his wife are being investigated by the Justice Department and accused President Donald Trump of targeting him for political reasons.“Today, my wife & I joined Donald Trump’s hit list.

media:content.media:text: Governor Newsom speaks while pointing his finger upwards
media:content.media:description: Gov. Gavin Newsom in Hayward, Calif., on March 2, 2026.

item.title: Gavin Newsom says DOJ is investigating him and his wife and blames Trump

item.dc:creator: Dennis Romero
Corky Siemaszko
Mosheh Gains
item.description: Eight people are presumed dead after a B-52 bomber crashed Monday at Edwards Air Force Base in California

media:content.media:text: Edwards Air Force Base, Calif., on February 24, 2017.
media:content.media:description: Edwards Air Force Base, Calif., on February 24, 2017.

item.title: 8 presumed dead after Air Force bomber crashes on takeoff at California base

item.dc:creator: Denise Chow
item.description: After it launches in August, NASA’s Nancy Grace Roman Space Telescope is expected to survey more of the sky than any space telescope before, at a pace hundreds of times faster.

media:content.media:text: Nancy Grace Roman Telescope
media:content.media:description: Scientists and engineers work on the Nancy Grace Roman Space Telescope at NASA's Goddard Space Flight Center in Greenbelt, Maryland, on May 22.

media:content.media:text: Nancy Grace Roman Telescope
media:content.media:description: Scientists and engineers work on the Nancy Grace Roman Space Telescope at NASA's Goddard Space Flight Center in Greenbelt, Maryland, on May 22.

media:content.media:text: Nancy Grace Roman Telescope
media:content.media:description: Scientists and engineers work on the Nancy Grace Roman Space Telescope at NASA's Goddard Space Flight Center in Greenbelt, Maryland, on May 22.

media:content.media:text: Nancy Grace Roman Telescope
media:content.media:description: Scientists and engineers work on the Nancy Grace Roman Space Telescope at NASA's Goddard Space Flight Center in Greenbelt, Maryland, on May 22.

media:content.media:text: Left: the Nancy Grace Roman Space Telescope in the clean room. Right: a Lego model of Nancy Grace Roman, a pioneer of modern space-based astronomy after whom NASA named its next-generation telescope in 2020.
media:content.media:description: Scientists and engineers work on the Nancy Grace Roman Space Telescope at NASA's Goddard Space Flight Center in Greenbelt, Maryland, on May 22.

media:content.media:text: Nancy Grace Roman Telescope
media:content.media:description: Scientists and engineers work on the Nancy Grace Roman Space Telescope at NASA's Goddard Space Flight Center in Greenbelt, Maryland, on May 22.

media:content.media:text: A panorama of the Andromeda galaxy.
media:content.media:description: Scientists and engineers work on the Nancy Grace Roman Space Telescope at NASA's Goddard Space Flight Center in Greenbelt, Maryland, on May 22.

media:content.media:text: Nancy Grace Roman Telescope
media:content.media:description: Scientists and engineers work on the Nancy Grace Roman Space Telescope at NASA's Goddard Space Flight Center in Greenbelt, Maryland, on May 22.

media:content.media:text: Left: A Goddard employee performs final checks on the Roman telescope in the clean room; right: a clock counts down the time remaining until the observatory is launched into space.
media:content.media:description: Scientists and engineers work on the Nancy Grace Roman Space Telescope at NASA's Goddard Space Flight Center in Greenbelt, Maryland, on May 22.

media:content.media:text: Nancy Grace Roman Telescope
media:content.media:description: Scientists and engineers work on the Nancy Grace Roman Space Telescope at NASA's Goddard Space Flight Center in Greenbelt, Maryland, on May 22.

item.title: 1,000 times faster than Hubble: Up close with the NASA space telescope meant to unlock the cosmos

item.dc:creator: Rebecca Cohen
Austin Mullen
item.description: James Barker, an executive producer on “Love Island USA,” died “after suffering an unexpected medical emergency” while the show was filming in Fiji, according to ITV America and Peacock.

media:content.media:text: James Barker
media:content.media:description: James Barker

item.title: ‘Love Island USA’ executive producer James Barker dies in Fiji while filming, networks say

item.description: NBC News chief data analyst Steve Kornacki breaks down real-time vote tallies from Alabama, California, D.C., Georgia and Oklahoma, while giving viewers a behind-the-scenes look at election night coverage.

media:content.media:title: Kornacki Cam: Watch Steve analyze midterm primary election results
media:content.media:description: NBC News chief data analyst Steve Kornacki breaks down real-time vote tallies from Alabama, California, D.C., Georgia and Oklahoma, while giving viewers a behind-the-scenes look at election night coverage.

item.title: Kornacki Cam: Watch Steve analyze midterm primary election results

item.dc:creator: Tim Stelloh
Maya Rosenberg
item.description: A federal judge in Florida ordered a teenager to remain behind bars until his trial in the sexual assault and murder of his stepsister aboard a cruise ship last year, according to court records unsealed Monday

media:content.media:text: Cruise Industry Helps Tourism To Be Back On Track In Portugal With Record Visits To The Country
media:content.media:description: A Carnival cruise ship

media:content.media:text: Anna Kepner takes a selfie in a mirror
media:content.media:description: Anna Kepner.

item.title: Judge orders teen accused of killing his stepsister on a cruise to be held in jail

item.dc:creator: Alicia Victoria Lozano
item.description: Three men have been charged with homicide in the rope-jumping death of a woman who plunged more than 130 feet off a bridge in Limeira, Brazil, without being properly secured to any equipment

media:content.media:text: A view of a bridge as seen from a highway
media:content.media:description: The Ponte do Esqueleto (Skeleton Bridge) in Sao Paulo, Brazil.

item.title: Three instructors charged in bridge-jumping death of woman not secured to rope

item.dc:creator: Henry J. Gomez
item.description: The vice president, in an interview with NBC News, also said text of the memorandum of understanding between the U.S. and Iran won’t be released until Friday.

media:content.media:text: Vice President JD Vance speaks to Nightly News' Tom Llamas on June 15, 2026.
media:content.media:description: Vice President JD Vance speaks to Nightly News' Tom Llamas on June 15, 2026.

item.title: Vance says nuclear inspectors ‘absolutely’ will return to Iran under terms to end war

item.dc:creator: Denise Chow
item.description: After it launches in August, NASA’s Nancy Grace Roman Space Telescope is expected to survey more of the sky than any space telescope before, at a pace hundreds of times faster.

media:content.media:text: Nancy Grace Roman Telescope
media:content.media:description: Scientists and engineers work on the Nancy Grace Roman Space Telescope at NASA's Goddard Space Flight Center in Greenbelt, Maryland, on May 22.

media:content.media:text: Nancy Grace Roman Telescope

media:content.media:description: Scientists and engineers work on the Nancy Grace Roman Space Telescope at NASA's Goddard Space Flight Center in Greenbelt, Maryland, on May 22.

media:content.media:text: Left: the Nancy Grace Roman Space Telescope in the clean room. Right: a Lego model of Nancy Grace Roman, a pioneer of modern space-based astronomy after whom NASA named its next-generation telescope in 2020.

media:content.media:text: Left: A Goddard employee performs final checks on the Roman telescope in the clean room; right: a clock counts down the time remaining until the observatory is launched into space.

media:content.media:text: Nancy Grace Roman Telescope
media:content.media:description: Scientists and engineers work on the Nancy Grace Roman Space Telescope at NASA's Goddard Space Flight Center in Greenbelt, Maryland, on May 22.

item.title: 1,000 times faster than Hubble: Up close with the NASA space telescope meant to unlock the cosmos
